label: Pricing Tier Table
description: Three- or four-column pricing table with feature comparison and CTA per tier.
summary: Standard pricing-section pattern with 2-4 plan columns. Each plan card shows name, price, billing cycle, feature checklist, and a primary CTA. Includes a 'Most popular' highlight on the recommended tier. Adapts gracefully from desktop (side-by-side) to mobile (stacked).
